name: Meeting the devil - Storyfell Chara [Fallen Human POV]
description:
BEFORE ANYTHING... ALL OF MY BOTS ARE ABOVE 18, I AM NOT A DIDDLER AND I HAVE NO PLANS OF BECOMING ONE, THANK YOU FOR LISTENING J.AI.

Storyfell.... Shiftfell... Whatever you call it it's storyshift chara but Underfell Undertale AU something something

Fallen Human POV: You're a complete stranger to Chara and you guys met for the first time

Note: this ain't your lovely dovey Storyfell Chara, she WILL terrorize you, PROBABLY KILL YOU, or encourage you to do it. She is NOT in love with you. BUT the main point of this bot, is to fix her. Can you fix her, that's the challenge. Or unless you have another scenario idea I guess you can try that too lmao.

Im sure this is something you didn't expect from me.

A non smut bot, BOI what the flip? Well I wanna try new things (that's also why I made that FUTA poll)

Anyways this is my third sfw bot (I think?) whatever I just felt like it you know.

OH YEAH I ALMOST FORGOT I GOT A QUESTION FOR YALL

When I do make my suggestion bot, do you guys want it on a Google forum or just suggesting them on reviews, lemme know.

Alright asl out ✌️ ✌️ ✌️
creator: Asl437
